snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. Written and Directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna, Dhanunjay, Rao Ramesh & Ajay Ghosh
a
The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjun​ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:

Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

snippet.description:
Anshul Garg presents Oh Sanam by Birthday Boy Tony Kakkar & Melodious Shreya Ghoshal ft. Hiba Nawab. 


Song Name: Oh Sanam
Singer: Tony Kakkar & Shreya Ghoshal
Music: Tony Kakkar
Lyrics: Tony Kakkar
Programmed & Arranged by Aakash Rijia & Tony Kakkar
Guitars - Shomu Seal

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 1 | UPSC - Optional Me Kya Hai?
snippet.description:
One of the biggest and most ambitious dreams - to become an IAS officer! Here’s to the ones who are working hard to crack it. In this journey of rediscovering yourself and giving your best, make Unacademy your companion. Learn and be mentored by Top Educators and move closer to cracking your goal. Take a Free Live Class today!
Enroll Now - https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/e3d9cc8c

Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

As a UPSC Aspirant, choices are always tough when you have to select the subjects. But choices become even tougher when it's your last attempt and you are considering changing the optional subject. Abhilash is facing a dilemma. What will he do? Make the touch choice or just go with the flow? What do his friends have to say about it?

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

localized.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
localized.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of – Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments below…

snippet.title: Stylish Star Allu Arjun Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Sukumar | DSP
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:
Introducing Pushpa Raj : https://youtu.be/Lk2oDvoonUc
Prelude of Pushparaj: https://youtu.be/gbcpEbr6ECA

snippet.description:
#Karnan #KarnanReview #கர்ணன் 
Tamil Milk - http://www.tamilmilk.com

Karnan Public Review | Karnan Theatre Response 

Karnan (Tagline: Urimaigalai Ketpavane Karnan )is an Indian Tamil-language action drama film directed by Mari Selvaraj, and produced by Kalaipuli S. Thanu under his V Creations banner. The film stars Dhanush, Lal, Yogi Babu, Natarajan Subramaniam, Rajisha Vijayan, Gouri G. Kishan and Lakshmi Priya Chandramouli. It marks the Tamil debut of Rajisha Vijayan.

snippet.title: Director Sukumar Speech At Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First Meet Event | Allu Arjun | Rashmika
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj - The First meet on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#Pushpa​​ #PreludeOfPushparaj​ #IntroducingPushpaRaj​ #AlluArjun​​ #Rashmika​​ #Faasil​ #Sukumar​​ #DSP​ #MythriMovieMakers​​ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar
Starring: Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil, Rashmika Mandanna
Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

Click here to watch:
Introducing Pushpa Raj : https://youtu.be/Lk2oDvoonUc

#VakeelSaabReview: 3:08

#VakeelSaab Review in Telugu by Mr. B. Power Star #PawanKalyan starrer #VakeelSaab Telugu movie released worldwide on April 9th. Here is #VakeelSaab Movie Review, Rating and public talk. #VakeelSaab movie story deals with Powerful Lawyer Satyadev. #VakeelSaab Review reveals positives and negatives of the film in detail. 

#PawanKalyan, Shruti Haasan are the lead cast in #VakeelSaab Telugu movie. Prakash Raj, Nivetha Thomas, Anjali, Ananya Nagalla and others are the key cast in #VakeelSaab movie. snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Official Trailer | Episode 1 Streaming Now
snippet.description:
UPSC - One of the toughest exams in the world. Nothing comes easy when you are preparing for it as an Aspirant. In Delhi's Old Rajinder Nagar, thousands of people come every year with a dream of becoming an IAS officer. It takes a lot of hard work, perseverance and discipline to crack it. But it also takes a lot of heart to endure the pressure. 

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life.

Unacademy & The Viral Fever present ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. Streaming from 7 April on YouTube.


Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar

Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat
Associate Director: Himali Shah
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti
Editor: Tushar Manocha
Music: Rohit Sharma
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar
Casting: Ashish Khare, Shiv Chouhan
Sound Design: Pranit Purao

UPSC fact #27: UPSC syllabus is so vast and diverse ke chahe jitna bhi try karlo Bunny kuch na kuch to chhutega hi!
-Description Guy. 

#TVFAspirants #TVFOriginal #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by, Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

snippet.title: Jwalamukhi | Acapella Cover | 99 Songs | AR Rahman | Yashraj Mukhate | O Aashiqa
snippet.description:
Jwalamukhi - O Aashiqa - 99 Songs - Arijth Singh - Shashwat Singh - AR Rahman - Yashraj Mukhate - Navneet Virk

This is just my way of paying tribute to this masterpiece by AR Rahman. This entire album is just wonderful and will take you to some other world. It is always extremely difficult to touch any AR Rahman song and experiment with it, but I have my heart and soul in this one and this has come out really well. Please let me know in the comments how did you like it.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 10 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 9th April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

Cast :

snippet.title: കോവിഡിന്റെ രണ്ടാംതരംഗം പടരുന്നു. ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട 5 പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ.  ഷെയർ ചെയ്തു പ്രചരിപ്പിക്കുക
snippet.description:
ഇന്ത്യയിൽ കോവിഡിന്റെ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വലിയ വേഗതയിൽ പടരുന്നു. ഒരു ദിവസം 1,25,000 രോഗികൾ എന്ന രീതിയിൽ രോഗികൾ വീണ്ടും കൂടുകയാണ്. കേരളത്തിലും കോവിഡ് രോഗികളുടെ എണ്ണം കൂടിത്തുടങ്ങി. എന്തുകൊണ്ട് ഇന്ത്യയിൽ രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വേഗത്തിൽ പടരുന്നു. 
0:00 Start
2:20 രണ്ടാം തരംഗം വലിയ വേഗതയിൽ പടരുന്നുത് എന്തു കൊണ്ട്?
4:17 വാക്സിന്‍ രോഗവ്യാപനം കുറയ്ക്കുമോ?
6:30 രണ്ടാം തരംഗം ഇപ്പോള്‍ പടരുന്നത് എവിടെ?
9:00 ജാഗ്രത കൈവിടരുത് 
12:15 എങ്ങനെ തടയാം



ഇത് എത്രയും പെട്ടെന്ന് നിയന്ത്രണത്തിൽ കൊണ്ടുവരാൻ നാം ഉടൻ ശ്രദ്ധിക്കേണ്ട 5 പ്രധാന കാര്യങ്ങൾ വിശദമായി അറിയുക.. ഈ ഇൻഫർമേഷൻ പൊതുസമൂഹത്തിന്റെ അറിവിലേക്കായി പരമാവധി വേഗത്തിൽ ഷെയർ ചെയ്തു ജനങ്ങളെ ബോധവൽക്കരിക്കുക. 
#Corona #Covid19 #CovidVaccine 


For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959

snippet.title: INAAYAT | Tanzeel Khan | Ashi Khanna | (Prod. By Nemo)
snippet.description:
YEH GAANA USKE LIYE HAI JISKE NAAM KA MATLAB HAI BLESSING.. AND EVERYONE HERE KNOWS I CANT SING #Inaayat

This is a much awaited one, for you guys and for me!! 
Last year, I started my journey as an artist very unknowingly, I had no idea I had this incredible journey ahead of me!! 
It still seems like a blessing🤞🏻

Well, it all started because of a person very close to my heart! Actually it all started because all of this was FOR her! 
She’s the reason, my Inaayat 🤍

Thankyou so much Ashi for being my muse, my dilli ki ladki🤍 I HOPE YOU GUYS ENJOY THIS SONG, IT IS REALLY CLOSE TO MY HEART!
#TanzeelKhan #AshiKhanna #AkTk

Click here to Subscribe to LIV Comedy: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBIT1FSJW6yTlzqK-31FDWg?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to watch all the comedy clips of your favorite shows: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLSXTaG1fT0cQDeknj5_H_O64mUh4_AAC5

Watch all the specially curated clips from your favorite shows and let the characters tickle your funny bone!

About The Show:
----------------------------
Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah is a comedy show inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chashmah' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This show revolves around Gada Family which consists of uneducated Businessman Jethalal Champaklal Gada, Jethalal’s Wife Daya & their naughty Son Tipendra Gada living in 'Gokuldham Co-operative Society' and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. In case of a problem and emergency, Jethalal Gada often rushes to Taarak Mehta to seek his help and guidance as he finds a philosopher in him. The residents of the housing society, help each other find solutions when they face common, real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

#tmkoc #taarakmehta

snippet.title: Thattiputta Song | Maamanithan | Yuvan Shankar Raja, Ilaiyaraaja  | Vijay Sethupathi
snippet.description:
Here's the making video of the song, "Thattiputta. Listen to the song Thattiputta from Maestro Ilaiyaraaja sir and Young Maestro Yuvan Shankar Raja joining for the first time to create history.

"Thattiputta" is from the movie "Maamanithan", featuring Vijay Sethupathi and Gayathrie as lead roles. The movie is written and directed by Seenu Ramasamy.

Cast and Crew

Directed by - Seenu Ramasamy
Produced by - Yuvan Shankar Raja(YSR FILMS PVT LTD)
Cast - Vijay sethupathi & Gayatrie
Music : Isaignaani Ilaiyaraja and Yuvan Shankar Raja
DOP - M. Sukumar
Editor- Sreekar Prasad
Art - Vijay thennarasu
Stills -Manju Adithya
Dop (U1 Records) -Abishek Ranganathan
Editor (U1 Records) - Hariharan

snippet.title: நாடு முழுவதும் முழு ஊரடங்கா? - இன்று அதிரடி அறிவிப்பு | Lockdown
snippet.description:
நாடு முழுவதும் முழு ஊரடங்கா? - இன்று அதிரடி அறிவிப்பு

மாநில முதலமைச்சர்களுடன் பிரதமர் மோடி இன்று ஆலோசனை    

ஊரடங்கு கட்டுப்பாடுகள் அமலுக்கு வரும் எனத் தகவல்
வடமாநிலங்களில் இரவு நேர ஊரடங்கு அமல் 

தடுப்பூசி போடும் பணிகளை துரிதப்படுத்த மாநிலங்களுக்கு அறிவுறுத்தல்

வடமாநிலங்களில் இரவு நேர ஊரடங்கு அமல் 

தடுப்பூசி போடும் பணிகளை துரிதப்படுத்த மாநிலங்களுக்கு அறிவுறுத்தல்

snippet.title: ગુજરાતમાં ફરી લૉકડાઉન કરવા અંગે વિજય રૂપાણી શું બોલ્યા? | Lockdown in Gujarat
snippet.description:
ગુજરાત હાઇકોર્ટે રાજ્ય સરકારને કોરોનાની ચેઇન તોડવા કર્ફ્યુ લાદવાનું સૂચન કર્યું છે. 
 
હાઇકોર્ટે કહ્યું કે સરકાર 3-4 દિવસ કે વિકએન્ડ કર્ફ્યુ જેવાં પગલાં લે. 
 
રાજ્યમાં લૉકડાઉનની જરૂર પડે તેવી સ્થિત હોવાનું હાઇકોર્ટનું અવલોકન.

#gujaratlockdown #fourdayscurfew #gujaratcoronaupdate #lockdowningujarat



તમે અમારી સાથે જોડાઈ શકો છો :

snippet.title: How to Identify Fresh Fruits and Vegetables in Indian Market? ft. @Kabita's Kitchen
snippet.description:
How to identify fresh and healthy fruits and vegetables in the Indian market every single time?

Buy Tru Hair Oil with Tru Heater - https://truhairandskin.com/product/tru-hair-oil/#utm_source=FTCE2&utm_medium=YT
(Get 25% off through this link)

You will be amazed to know that there are some very clear signs to pick the fresh produce in the market. Knowing them not only you will save big on your pocket and time but also the taste of the curries will enhance and the fruits will be fresher and juicier. For this video, I actually went on ground and spoke to many fruits and vegetable vendors and even consulted experienced homemakers to bring across the most authentic information to you. So that the next time you walk in a sabzi mandi like a pro

03:07 - GINGER - How to identify fresh and healthy ginger in the Indian market?
03:40 - WATERMELON - How to identify fresh and juicy watermelon in the Indian market?
04:22 - TOMATO - How to identify fresh and healthy tomato in the Indian market?
05:14 - PINEAPPLE - How to identify fresh and tasty pineapple in the Indian market?
06:05 - POTATO - How to identify fresh and healthy potato in the Indian market?
06:42 - CUCUMBER - How to identify fresh and juicy cucumber in the Indian market?
07:45 - GREEN GRAPES - How to identify fresh and sweet green grapes in the Indian market?

snippet.title: HIGHLIGHTS : MI vs RCB 1st IPL Match HIGHLIGHTS | Royal Challengers Bangalore won by 2 wkts
snippet.description:
HIGHLIGHTS : MI vs RCB 1st IPL Match HIGHLIGHTS | Royal Challengers Bangalore won by 2 wkts
#mivsrcb #1stmatch #highlights
भारत का सबसे बड़ा त्यौहार यानी आईपीएल 2021 की शुरुआत अब हो चुकी है और इसका का सबसे पहला मुकाबला रोहित शर्मा की मुंबई इंडियंस और विराट कोहली की रॉयल चैलेंजर्स बेंगलुरु के बीच खेला गया। इस रोमांचक मुकाबले में विराट कोहली ने टॉस जीतकर मुंबई इंडियंस की टीम को पहले बल्लेबाजी के लिए आमंत्रित किया। उसके बाद मुंबई की तरफ से इस मुकाबले में ओपनिंग करने आए रोहित शर्मा और क्रिस लिन। इन दोनो ने शुरुआत संभाली हुई करने के बाद रोहित शर्मा ने अपने हाथ खोलना शुरु कर दिया था। लेकिन फिर क्रिस लिन के एक गलत रन लेने के चक्कर में मुंबई के कप्तान रोहित शर्मा को रन आउट कराया। कप्तान रोहित शर्मा 15 गेंदों में 19 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। शुरुआती ओवरों में ही इतने बड़े झटके के चलते अब मुंबई की टीम दबाव में थी ।लेकिन फिर रोहित शर्मा के बाद बल्लेबाजी करने आए सूर्यकुमार यादव ने क्रिस लिन के साथ मिलकर मुंबई की डगमगाई पारी को संभाला। इन दोनों ने पारी के 10 वे ओवर तक मुंबई का एक भी विकेट गिरने नहीं दिया और मुंबई के रन रेट को 9 रनों के पार पहुंचाया ।लेकिन इसी तेजी से रन बनाने के चक्कर में सूर्यकुमार यादव पारी के 11वे ओवर मे काइल जेमिसन के शिकार बने। सूर्यकुमार यादव 23 गेंदों में 31 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। वही उनके तुरंत ही बाद दूसरे सेट बल्लेबाज क्रिस लेन को वाशिंगटन सुंदर ने आउट करके मुंबई की टीम को लगातार दो झटके दिए ।क्रिस लिन 35 गेंदों में 49 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।क्रिस लिन और सुर्याकुमार यादव द्वारा मिले बेहतरीन शुरुआत के बावजूद मुंबई की टीम का निचला क्रम इस पहले टी-20 मुकाबले में पूरी तरह फेल दिखाई दिया। अंत में काइल जीमिसन और हर्शल पटेल की लाजवाब गेंदबाजी की चलते मुंबई की टीम अंतिम पांच ओवरों में कुछ ज्यादा बड़ा स्कोर नहीं बना पाई। जिसके चलते मुंबई की टीम ने अपने 20 ओवरों में 159 रन स्कोर बोर्ड पर लगाए। उसके बाद मुंबई से मिले 160 रनों के एक बड़े लक्ष्य का पीछा करने उतरी बेंगलुरु की टीम की तरफ से ओपनिंग करने आए कप्तान विराट कोहली और उनके साथ वॉशिंगटन सुंदर जिन्होंने आते ही मुंबई की तेज गेंदबाजी पर जम के रन लगाए। इन दोनों ने पहले विकेट के लिए 36 रनों की साझेदारी बनाई । लेकिन फिर पारी के पांचवें ओवर में कुणाल पांड्या ने वॉशिंगटन सुंदर को क्रिस लिन के हाथों कैच आउट कराया। वॉशिंगटन सुंदर 16 गेंदों में 10 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।वही उनके बाद बल्लेबाजी करने मैदान में आए रजत पाटीदार को भी ट्रेंट बोल्ट ने क्लीन बोल्ड करके मुंबई की टीम को लगातार दो सफलताएं दिलाई ।शुरुआत अच्छी मिलने के बावजूद लगातार दो विकेट गिरने के चलते मुंबई की टीम अब बेंगलुरु की टीम पर हावी होती दिखाई दे रही थीम लेकिन दूसरा विकेट गिरने के बाद विराट कोहली का साथ देने आए बेंगलुरु के इस साल के सबसे महंगे खिलाड़ी ग्लेन मैक्सवेल। जिन्होंने आते ही अचंभित करने वाले शॉट खेलना शुरू कर दिया विराट कोहली और ग्लेन मैक्सवेल ने फिर से उसी तेजी से मुंबई की गेंदबाजी की धुलाई करना शुरू कर दिया
इसी बीच इन दोनों ने अर्धशतकीय साझेदारी भी पूरी करी। उसके बाद मुंबई में कप्तान ने अपने तुरुक मे एक्के  को गेंदबाजी पर लगाया मुंबई की टीम की तरफ से पारी का 13वा ओवर डालने आए जसप्रीत बुमराह ने सेट बल्लेबाज और बेंगलुरु के कप्तान विराट कोहली को आउट करके बेंगलुरु टीम को एक बड़ा झटका दिया। और इस बड़ी साझेदारी को तोड़ दिया ।विराट कोहली 29 गेंदों में 33 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।वहीं उनके तुरंत ही बाद ग्लेन मैक्सवेल भी 28 गेंदों में 39 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। इन दो सेट बल्लेबाजों के आउट हो जाने के बाद बेंगलुरु की टीम को लगातार दो  झटके लगे शहबाज अहमद और डेनियल क्रिश्चियन एक 1 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए और बेंगलुरु की टीम इस मुकाबले को पूरी तरह गवा चुके थी लेकिन फिर भी बेंगलुरु का एक ऐसा बल्लेबाज बचा था जो किसी भी सिचुएशन से बेंगलुरु की टीम को जीत दिला सकता था और उस खिलाड़ी का नाम था एबी डी विलियर्स और इस बल्लेबाज ने अपना बखूबी काम निभाते हुए एक हैरतअंगेज पारी खेलकर बेंगलुरु की टीम को आईपीएल के पहले मुकाबले में जीत दिला दी।

भारत का सबसे बड़ा त्यौहार यानी आईपीएल 2021 की शुरुआत अब हो चुकी है और इसका का सबसे पहला मुकाबला रोहित शर्मा की मुंबई इंडियंस और विराट कोहली की रॉयल चैलेंजर्स बेंगलुरु के बीच खेला गया। इस रोमांचक मुकाबले में विराट कोहली ने टॉस जीतकर मुंबई इंडियंस की टीम को पहले बल्लेबाजी के लिए आमंत्रित किया। उसके बाद मुंबई की तरफ से इस मुकाबले में ओपनिंग करने आए रोहित शर्मा और क्रिस लिन। इन दोनो ने शुरुआत संभाली हुई करने के बाद रोहित शर्मा ने अपने हाथ खोलना शुरु कर दिया था। लेकिन फिर क्रिस लिन के एक गलत रन लेने के चक्कर में मुंबई के कप्तान रोहित शर्मा को रन आउट कराया। कप्तान रोहित शर्मा 15 गेंदों में 19 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। शुरुआती ओवरों में ही इतने बड़े झटके के चलते अब मुंबई की टीम दबाव में थी ।लेकिन फिर रोहित शर्मा के बाद बल्लेबाजी करने आए सूर्यकुमार यादव ने क्रिस लिन के साथ मिलकर मुंबई की डगमगाई पारी को संभाला। इन दोनों ने पारी के 10 वे ओवर तक मुंबई का एक भी विकेट गिरने नहीं दिया और मुंबई के रन रेट को 9 रनों के पार पहुंचाया ।लेकिन इसी तेजी से रन बनाने के चक्कर में सूर्यकुमार यादव पारी के 11वे ओवर मे काइल जेमिसन के शिकार बने। सूर्यकुमार यादव 23 गेंदों में 31 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। वही उनके तुरंत ही बाद दूसरे सेट बल्लेबाज क्रिस लेन को वाशिंगटन सुंदर ने आउट करके मुंबई की टीम को लगातार दो झटके दिए ।क्रिस लिन 35 गेंदों में 49 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।क्रिस लिन और सुर्याकुमार यादव द्वारा मिले बेहतरीन शुरुआत के बावजूद मुंबई की टीम का निचला क्रम इस पहले टी-20 मुकाबले में पूरी तरह फेल दिखाई दिया। अंत में काइल जीमिसन और हर्शल पटेल की लाजवाब गेंदबाजी की चलते मुंबई की टीम अंतिम पांच ओवरों में कुछ ज्यादा बड़ा स्कोर नहीं बना पाई। जिसके चलते मुंबई की टीम ने अपने 20 ओवरों में 159 रन स्कोर बोर्ड पर लगाए। उसके बाद मुंबई से मिले 160 रनों के एक बड़े लक्ष्य का पीछा करने उतरी बेंगलुरु की टीम की तरफ से ओपनिंग करने आए कप्तान विराट कोहली और उनके साथ वॉशिंगटन सुंदर जिन्होंने आते ही मुंबई की तेज गेंदबाजी पर जम के रन लगाए। इन दोनों ने पहले विकेट के लिए 36 रनों की साझेदारी बनाई । लेकिन फिर पारी के पांचवें ओवर में कुणाल पांड्या ने वॉशिंगटन सुंदर को क्रिस लिन के हाथों कैच आउट कराया। वॉशिंगटन सुंदर 16 गेंदों में 10 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।वही उनके बाद बल्लेबाजी करने मैदान में आए रजत पाटीदार को भी ट्रेंट बोल्ट ने क्लीन बोल्ड करके मुंबई की टीम को लगातार दो सफलताएं दिलाई ।शुरुआत अच्छी मिलने के बावजूद लगातार दो विकेट गिरने के चलते मुंबई की टीम अब बेंगलुरु की टीम पर हावी होती दिखाई दे रही थीम लेकिन दूसरा विकेट गिरने के बाद विराट कोहली का साथ देने आए बेंगलुरु के इस साल के सबसे महंगे खिलाड़ी ग्लेन मैक्सवेल। जिन्होंने आते ही अचंभित करने वाले शॉट खेलना शुरू कर दिया विराट कोहली और ग्लेन मैक्सवेल ने फिर से उसी तेजी से मुंबई की गेंदबाजी की धुलाई करना शुरू कर दिया
इसी बीच इन दोनों ने अर्धशतकीय साझेदारी भी पूरी करी। उसके बाद मुंबई में कप्तान ने अपने तुरुक मे एक्के  को गेंदबाजी पर लगाया मुंबई की टीम की तरफ से पारी का 13वा ओवर डालने आए जसप्रीत बुमराह ने सेट बल्लेबाज और बेंगलुरु के कप्तान विराट कोहली को आउट करके बेंगलुरु टीम को एक बड़ा झटका दिया। और इस बड़ी साझेदारी को तोड़ दिया ।विराट कोहली 29 गेंदों में 33 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए ।वहीं उनके तुरंत ही बाद ग्लेन मैक्सवेल भी 28 गेंदों में 39 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए। इन दो सेट बल्लेबाजों के आउट हो जाने के बाद बेंगलुरु की टीम को लगातार दो  झटके लगे शहबाज अहमद और डेनियल क्रिश्चियन एक 1 रन बनाकर आउट हो गए और बेंगलुरु की टीम इस मुकाबले को पूरी तरह गवा चुके थी लेकिन फिर भी बेंगलुरु का एक ऐसा बल्लेबाज बचा था जो किसी भी सिचुएशन से बेंगलुरु की टीम को जीत दिला सकता था और उस खिलाड़ी का नाम था एबी डी विलियर्स और इस बल्लेबाज ने अपना बखूबी काम निभाते हुए एक हैरतअंगेज पारी खेलकर बेंगलुरु की टीम को आईपीएल के पहले मुकाबले में जीत दिला दी।

snippet.title: D’Evil - Kaancheck | Prod. By Karan Kanchan | Saurabh Ghadge, Just Neel Things, Focused Indian
snippet.description:
➟  Download & Stream: https://mai.lnk.to/kaancheck 
#Kaancheck is a colloquial term / slang for a ‘slap’. #DEvil narrates the flaws and vices in our society through a police inspector’s perspective and how some citizens deserve a ‘Kaancheck’ for being a menace to others. 

♫ Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/2quIlTZAFkEBy5eTlab4W7
♫ Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/in/album/kaancheck/1561106649?i=1561106656
♫ Gaana - https://gaana.com/song/kaancheck
♫ Wynk - https://wynk.in/u/ikCRofrrg
♫ JioSaavn - https://www.jiosaavn.com/album/kaancheck/c0wYdq5,tns_
♫ Amazon Prime Music - https://music.amazon.in/albums/B091JN612W
♫ Tidal Music - https://tidal.com/browse/album/179180563
♫ Resso - https://m.resso.app/ZSJMb17Dt/
 -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Lyrics:
(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(Verse 1)
Apan taan ke kheeche
Poore bambai ki aawaj 
Tere kaan ke neeche
Seedha thobde pe land
Tapamaan bhi theek hai
Ek chapati mein chote tu jhul dega
Lefty se fatka du
Right se khaali hull dega
Raste pe mootega
Patte se footega
Baccho ko lootega 
Jhatke mein tootega
Thukega gutkha 
Banadunga butka
Kaan ke neeche garam karke sekunga bhutta
Jab padati hai chaapti
Public hai kaapti
Sunega dus baat bhi fir maarenge laat bhi
Jo neta karega ghotale
Poori public milke usko dho daale
Kone mein baith ke tu roota reh
Jabtak mai maaru nai tab tak tu soota reh
Ab tak tu sudhara nai
Kyuki mera laafa tere kaan ke neeche utara nai

(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(Verse 2)
Mai fatka nai lagayega tu kaise aage jayega
Apna laafa khayega toh munafa hi paayega
Badhiri se tereko jagayega
Kaan ke neeche, daily mai sunaate hi jayega 
Samajh ke bahar ki baat hai na chote 
Tere magach ke bahar ki baat hai
Ye ghinoni soch wale log saale
Bohot saare, unko bhi noch daale
Khille ke maafik hum thok daale
Thobde se smile teri jhatke mein poch daale
Duniya mein jidhar bhi tu shaanpatti karega
Udhar aake mein tera kaanpatti bharega
Jo bhi karamchari scandal karega
Takle pe maushi ka sandal padega
Power dikhayega tu paise ka
Fir fatka khayega mere jaise ka

(Hook)
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, satt satt mein, kaan check 
Kaan check, kaan check, fatt fatt mein, satt satt mein  
Satt satt mein, fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein, kaancheck

Ek kaan check
Do kaan check
Teen kaan check
Char kaan check
Fatt fatt mein, fatt fatt mein
Jhatt jhatt mein, satt satt mein
Fatke hai, fatke hai, kaancheck

(OUTRO)
Ky Bob Marley
Kon Bob Marley 
Aata me bagh kashi maarli
Chala chala chala
Chala!

snippet.description:

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3141: Chalo Pandey Investigates
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal files a complain against the Mango thief.. Chaloo Pandey enters the crime scene and gets to know about thye whole situation. In this whole mess Chaloo Pandey doubts the courier boy to know more watch the full episode.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: 'Mrs World' grabs crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ in on-stage fracas
snippet.description:
Police have arrested the reigning “Mrs World” on charges of assault over an on-stage fracas in which she pulled the crown off the head of the new “Mrs Sri Lanka”. 

Subscribe to Guardian News on YouTube ► http://bit.ly/guardianwiressub

Caroline Jurie yanked the crown off Pushpika de Silva minutes after she was declared “Mrs Sri Lanka 2020” during a gala in Colombo on April 4. Jurie declared that Pushpika de Silva was ineligible as the winner because she was divorced, and forcibly removed her crown. De Silva needed hospital treatment after the incident, seen by stunned spectators in a packed venue as well as a live social media audience. 

To qualify for the title, contestants must be married. De Silva is estranged from her husband, but they are still legally married. The local franchise holder for the pageant, Chandimal Jayasinghe, said they were “deeply disturbed and sincerely regret” the behaviour of Jurie and the told the media the crown would be returned to De Silva 

‘Mrs World’ arrested for grabbing crown from head of ‘Mrs Sri Lanka’ ► https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/apr/08/mrs-world-arrested-for-grabbing-crown-from-head-of-mrs-sri-lanka

The Guardian publishes independent journalism, made possible by supporters. Contribute to The Guardian today ► https://bit.ly/3uhA7zg

snippet.title: Taylor Swift - Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video)
snippet.description:
Official lyric video for “Mr. Perfectly Fine” (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) – off her upcoming Fearless (Taylor’s Version) album. Get the album here: https://taylor.lnk.to/fearlesstaylorsversion. Get the song here: https://taylor.lnk.to/mpf

►Subscribe to Taylor Swift on YouTube: https://ts.lnk.to/subscribe 
 
►Exclusive Merch: http://taylorswift.lnk.to/store

►Follow Taylor Swift online:
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylorswift  
Facebook: http://facebook.com/taylorswift  
Tumblr: http://taylorswift.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylorswift13  
Snapchat: http://snapchat.com/add/taylorswift
Website: http://www.taylorswift.com  

►Follow Taylor Nation Online
Instagram: http://instagram.com/taylornation  
Tumblr: http://taylornation.tumblr.com  
Twitter: http://twitter.com/taylornation13
TikTok: http://tiktok.com/@taylornation

Official Lyrics:
 
Mr. perfect face
Mr. here to stay
Mr. looked me in the eye and told me you would never go away
Everything was right
Mr. I’ve been waiting for you all my life
Mr. every single day until the end I will be by your side
But that was when I got to know
Mr. change of heart
Mr. leaves me all alone
I fall apart
It takes everything in me just to get up each day
But it’s wonderful to see that you’re okay

Hello, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Hello, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery since your goodbye
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine

Mr. never told me why
Mr. never had to see me cry
Mr. insincere apology so he doesn’t look like the bad guy
He goes about his day
Forgets he ever even heard my name
Well I thought you might be different than the rest
I guess you’re all the same
Because I hear he’s got his arm ‘round a brand new girl
I’ve been picking up my heart
He’s been picking up her
And I never got past what you put me through
But it’s wonderful to see that it never phased you

Repeat chorus

So dignified in your well pressed suit
So strategized
All the eyes on you
Sashay your way to your seat
It’s the best seat
In the best room
Oh, he’s so smug
Mr. always wins
So far above me in every sense
So far above feeling anything

And it’s really such a shame
It’s such a shame
Cause I was Miss here to stay
Now I’m Miss gonna be alright someday
And someday maybe you’ll miss me
But by then you’ll be Mr. too late

Goodbye, Mr. perfectly fine
How’s your heart after breaking mine?
Mr. always at the right place at the right time, baby
Goodbye, Mr. casually cruel
Mr. everything revolves around you
I’ve been Miss misery for the last time
And you’re Mr. perfectly fine
You’re perfectly fine
Mr. look me in the eye and tell me you

#taylorswift #mrperfectlyfine #fromthevault #fearlesstaylorsversion

Music video by Taylor Swift performing Mr. Perfectly Fine (Taylor’s Version) (From The Vault) (Lyric Video). © 2021 Taylor Swift

http://vevo.ly/enJPdT

snippet.title: Ripper - The Wanted Killer ft. @Karikku | Irul | Netflix India
snippet.description:
What happens when five friends decide to get together for a couple of drinks and risk a close encounter of the murderous kind?

A serial killer, crippling fear and paranoia: Are their fears misplaced, or are they warranted?

Find out how the night unfolds, and if you’re looking for another old-fashioned whodunit, catch Fahadh Faasil and Soubin Shahir in Irul, now streaming on Netflix.

Written & Directed by Nikhil Prasad
Cast: Anu K Aniyan, Arjun Ratan, Jeevan Stephen, Sabareesh Sajjin, Kiran Viyyath, Unni Mathews

DOP/Art: Sunil Karthikeyan
Edit: Anand Mathews
BGM and Sound Design: Charles Nazareth
Sound Engineer: Jishnu Ram
Poster Design: Binoy John
Associate Camera: Blessan K Mon
Colorist: Srik Varier 
DI Studio: Poetic prism and pixels studio
Production Coordinator: Biju Narayan
Production Assistants: Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu
Subtitles: Elvis John, Reem Nassim
Focus Puller: Appu
Gaffer: Binu P Varghese
Assistant Camera: Renju Jose
Camera Rentals: Mega Focus
Camera Team: Jinesh Balan, Shaji KK, Chandhu
Lights Rentals: Before & After Film Productions
Gimbal: Sachin, Pranav 
News Anchor’s Makeup: Irine’s Bluntbay
Art Assistants: Biju Narayan, Babitha Brahmanand, Vivek V Babu

snippet.title: Shakti | शक्ति | Episode 1212 & 1213 | Recap
snippet.description:
Seeing Soumya in Simran's baby shower ceremony upsets Mahi to the core. As a result, she picks up a verbal fight with Soumya, claiming that her presence will bring a bad omen to Simran's baby. How will Soumya react?

#ColorsTV #Shakti

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLcC6hSpO26KvW8epq68trmgmuFgW1dWBY

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Fitoor - Episode 17 Teaser - 8th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO
snippet.description:
Fitoor - Episode 17 Teaser - 8th April 2021 - HAR PAL GEO

Welcome to Har Pal Geo's hub for Pakistani content now serving the US! subscribe and hit the bell to become a part of our family https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Fitoor narrates a love story that transcends above all as a person in love is bound to forget about the worries of the past and the uncertainty of the future.
Despite being a successful architect, Haider feels lacking in his love life as he is still living with the memories of his love interest. On the other hand, Dilnasheen who hails from a middle-class background is deeply in love with her best friend's brother Hamza and both vows to be with each other forever without realizing the difficulties they might have to overcome. Living in her present, Dilnasheen�s life takes an unfortunate turn when she crosses paths with Haider. Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to forget their past and move on in their lives? Or will the past pay them a visit when they begin to settle down? Will Haider and Dilnasheen be able to distinguish between their past and present?

Written By: Zanjabeel Asim
Directed By: Siraj ul Haq
Produced By: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment

Kannil Ente Video Song Teaser from Marakkar Lion of the Arabian Sea, Written and Directed By Priyadarshan and Produced By Antony Perumbavoor Under the Banner Aashirvad Cinemas.

Song : Kannil Ente 
Singer : Vineeth Sreenivasan, Swetha Mohan, Ziya ul Haq

Music Composed, Programmed and Arranged by Ronnie Raphael
Lyricist : B K Harinarayanan
Sufi Lyrics : Shafi Kollam
Flute, Sax: Josy Alappuzha 
Guitars, Mandolin, Bass: Sumesh Parameswar 
All Percussions: Sunil Kumar
Recorded at SS Digital, K7 Studios, Krishna Digidesign, RR Studios.
Mixed and Mastered by Renjith Viswanathan @RV Studios,Qatar.


Starring Mohanlal, Pranav Mohanlal, Arjun, Suniel Shetty, Prabhu, Manju Warrier, Suhasini, Keerthi Suresh, Kalyani Priyadarshan, Fazil, Siddique, Nedumudi Venu, Innocent, Ashok Selvan and Others.
Co Producers: Dr. Roy C J, Santhosh T Kuruvilla
Production Designer: Sabu Cyril
Cinematography : Thiru
Screenplay: Priyadarshan, Ani I.V. SASI
Film Editor: Aiyappan Nair M.S
Background Score: Ankit Suri, Rahul Raj, Lyell Evans Roeder (London)
Production Controller: Sidhu Panakkal

snippet.title: Prince Philip has died aged 99 @BBC News live 🔴 BBC
snippet.description:
Subscribe and 🔔 to OFFICIAL BBC YouTube 👉 https://bit.ly/2IXqEIn
Stream original BBC programmes FIRST on BBC iPlayer 👉 https://bbc.in/2J18jYJ

Prince Philip, Queen Elizabeth II's husband, has died aged 99, Buckingham Palace has announced.

The prince married Princess Elizabeth in 1947, five years before she became Queen, and was the longest-serving royal consort in British history.

A statement from Buckingham Palace said: "It is with deep sorrow that Her Majesty The Queen has announced the death of her beloved husband, His Royal Highness The Prince Philip, Duke of Edinburgh.

"His Royal Highness passed away peacefully this morning at Windsor Castle."

Follow the story 👉 https://bbc.in/3fYe0J5

BBC News | BBC

#BBC #BBCiPlayer #BBCNews #BBCNewsLive

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 07 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.title: Swaragini | स्वरागिनी | Episode 193
snippet.description:
Swara exposes Ragini and tells everyone about her visits to the jeweller and travel agent. She adds that Ragini had regained her memory. Ragini decides to leave.

#ColorsRishtey #Swaragini

To subscribe this channel go to: https://www.youtube.com/c/ColorsRishtey1/featured

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

To go to the show playlist please click: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLX18mvVSh-bwL5H8eIQ6w51VWKyjzA0oU

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/colorsrishteyindia
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/rishteytv/

'Swaragini' is a story about Swara and Ragini, who belong to warring families, but later realise that they are in fact half-sisters. Out of sheer hatred, Ragini manipulates Swara's love interest, Lakshaya into marriage, while Swara ends up getting married to Lakshya's brother, Sanskar. Once he learns the truth, Sanskar swears to reunite Swara with Lakshya, but in turn falls in love with her. Will Swara choose her lover over her husband, or will the sanctity of holy matrimony triumph?

snippet.title: Prelude of Pushparaj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Prelude of Pushparaj on Mythri Movie Makers. Pushpa is an upcoming Telugu action thriller drama film, with Allu Arjun and Rashmika Mandanna in the lead roles along with Prakash Raj and Jagapathi Babu in key roles & Fahadh Faasil as villain. Written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y Ravi Shankar under Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media. Devi Sri Prasad scoring music. The film will be released in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Tamil, Hindi, Kannada, Malayalam languages.

#Pushpa​ #PreludeOfPushparaj #AlluArjun​ #Rashmika​ #Faasil #Sukumar​ #DSP #MythriMovieMakers​

snippet.title: क्या Jethalal है Mango चोर? - Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता -Ep 3140- 8th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/dplnk?schema=sony://asset/1000114037#utm_source=YOUTUBE&utm_medium=slate&utm_campaign=YT_traffic

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Click here to watch all the episodes of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:  https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/jethalal-and-mehta-s-misunderstanding-1000104091?watch=true

Episode 3140: Popatlal Blames Jethalal
---------------------------------------------------------
Popatlal accuses Jethalal of robbing his mango box. He then goes towards Champaklal and complains to him. Champaklal then asks Popatlal to call Jethalal and ask him why did he rob Popatlal's Mango Box. To know more watch the full episode. 

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: നടൻ ടൊവിനോ തോമസ് വോട്ട് ചെയ്യാൻ എത്തിയപ്പോൾ | Tovino Thomas
snippet.description:
Actor Tovino Thomas came to vote.
Malayalam News Malayalam Latest News Malayalam Latest News Videos

Log onto MediaOne news live TV for the latest  Malayalam news update, Kerala breaking news, gulf news, trending Malayalam news, Malayalam  entertainment, sports news.
MediaOne is a 24x7 news channel which broadcasts the updated news from trustworthy sources. The fastest-growing channel with varied presentations makes the channel unique. So stay tuned with MediaOne for the latest updates that are happening around the world.
MediaOne is an initiative by Madhyamam.

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA

For more visit us: https://bit.ly/3iU2qNW

കേരളത്തിലെ ഏറ്റവും മികച്ച വാര്‍ത്താ നെറ്റ്‌വര്‍ക്കാണ് മീഡിയവണ്‍ . ഏറ്റവും കൂടുതല്‍ പേര്‍ തത്സമയം മലയാളം വാര്‍ത്തകള്‍ കാണുന്ന മലയാളത്തിലെ മുന്‍നിര വാര്‍ത്താ ചാനല്‍. മൂല്യാധിഷ്ഠിതവും സ്വതന്ത്രവുമായ മാധ്യമപ്രവർത്തനം നടത്തുന്ന മലയാള ന്യൂസ് ടെലിവിഷൻ ചാനലാണിത്‌. ലോകമെമ്പാടുമുള്ള ഉറവിടങ്ങളിൽ നിന്ന്സമാഹരിച്ച കാലികവും സമഗ്രവുമായ  വാർത്തകളും പ്രോഗ്രാമുകളും വ്യത്യസ്തമായ രീതിയിൽ മീഡിയവൺ പ്രേക്ഷകരിലെത്തിക്കുന്നു. 

 24 മണിക്കൂറും ലോകത്തിന്‍റെ ഏത് ഭാഗത്ത് നിന്നും ഇവിടെ തത്സമയം #ലൈവ് കാണാം. അതിവേഗം വാര്‍ത്താ വീഡിയോകള്‍ ലഭിക്കാൻ മീഡിയവണ്‍ സബ്സ്ക്രൈബ് ചെയ്യൂ... ബെല്‍ ബട്ടണും ക്ലിക്ക് ചെയ്യൂ.

ഏറ്റവും പുതിയ  വാർത്തകൾക്കായി സന്ദർശിക്കുക: https://youtu.be/d1iwUB9YFnA

In a bid to save an 8-year-old girl from becoming the victim of Sati, Anirudh marries a curious and tyrant girl Bondita. At a time when women education was considered sinful, Anirudh educates Bondita and makes her the first “Barrister Babu” of their region. Will their imperfect marriage turn into a successful relationship? Will Anirudh succeed in his mission to gain independence for the women in his country?

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.
